dict.string: Blackcrab needs access to your Desktop so Claude Code can read and edit project files in repositories you keep there.
Blackcrab needs access to your Documents folder so Claude Code can read and edit project files there.
Blackcrab needs access to your Downloads folder so Claude Code can work with files you've downloaded.
Blackcrab needs access to removable volumes so Claude Code can work with files on external drives.
Blackcrab needs access to network volumes so Claude Code can work with files on shared drives.
Blackcrab uses Apple Events to launch and control the integrated terminal.
